text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto joins T.M. Opera O to watch the
previous generation race in the Derby.

Special Week emerges the winner among this
collection of highly talented runners. There's no
confusion as to why they're known as the Ultimate
Generation.

Seeing her own skills as nonexistent in
comparison, Meisho Doto flies into a panic.

With a stern scolding by T.M. Opera O, Meisho
Doto comes back to her senses. She looks to her
upcoming debut race with extraordinary gusto.
